text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki hasn't been feeling great lately, so we
decide to visit a shrine together. After we're done
praying, she turns to me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming with me. I hope I wasn't too
much of a burden.
choice_data_list: You weren't a burden at all.
You weren't a burden at all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I actually train at this shrine by myself quite
often.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I thought I might feel better if I came here, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm? That voice sounds familiar...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We see Special Week and Silence Suzuka
sprinting up the stairs.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... You're amazing, Spe... You almost... overtook me there...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Guh! I want a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Sure thing. But I'm not going to let you win.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to! I'm gonna get you for sure this
time!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Those darling ponies are absolutely glowing with
brilliance!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: They're even brighter than usual!
choice_data_list: Why don't you go say hi?
Why don't you go say hi?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm, I suppose I could...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But I think I'll refrain.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I don't want to impede on their competition.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Instead, how about we pray again and ask that all
their hard work pays off?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's the least I can do to thank them for inspiring
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's expression lights up, as if the clouds
brooding over her mind have parted.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I can't find the right words to say to them now...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Besides, compared to how luminous they are, I'm
no more than—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sorry. I didn't mean to bring the mood down.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let's go before they spot us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki leaves the shrine, looking downcast...
